hooks.command:
root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0
cd "$root" || exit 0
PC="$root/backend/venv/bin/pre-commit"
[ -x "$PC" ] || exit 0
list=$( { git diff --name-only HEAD; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard; } | sort -u )
[ -n "$list" ] || exit 0
oldIFS=$IFS
IFS="
"
set --
for f in $list; do
  set -- "$@" "$f"
done
IFS=$oldIFS
"$PC" run --files "$@" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { out=$("$PC" run --files "$@" 2>&1) || { printf "%s\n" "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; }
